data.title: Trump Predicts 'Tremendous, Thundering Landslide' In 2026 Midterms, Says Tariffs Will Help Republicans Win Big
data.description: Trump presents tariffs as GOP boost for 2026 midterms, but faces bipartisan concerns and criticism from Dems over rising prices.

data.title: IRS Reverses Stance, Will Hand Over Undocumented Taxpayer Info To Immigration Authorities: 'It's Unprecedented'
data.description: In a major policy shift, the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) has agreed to share certain tax information of undocumented taxpayers with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE).

data.title: Apple Reportedly Flew 5 Flights Of iPhones Ahead Of Trump's 104% Tariffs On China Taking Effect: Stock Sinks Amid Esclating US-China Trade Tensions
data.description: Apple raced to transport products from India and China to the U.S. before new tariffs took effect, stockpiling inventory and potentially raising production costs.

Trump's Tariff Push Drags Down His Personal Fortune — Here's How Much The Billionaire President Has Lost Since 'Liberation Day'
data.description: Trump's net worth declines by $500 Million amidst tariff-induced market volatility.
